```{=html}
<!-- replace_when() - cap body_mass_g at 5000 -->
<script>
window.RW_DATA = [
  ['Adelie',    'Biscoe',    '3750'],
  ['Adelie',    'Dream',     '3800'],
  ['Gentoo',    'Biscoe',    '5200'],
  ['Gentoo',    'Biscoe',    '5400']
];
window.RW_COLS = ['species', 'island', 'body_mass_g'];
// Which rows have body_mass_g > 5000 (rows 2 and 3)
window.RW_MATCHES = [false, false, true, true];
window.RW_HIGHLIGHT_COLOR = '#e8853a';
</script>
```

::: {.rw-stage-wrap}
<div id="rw-stage"></div>
:::

[]{.fragment .rw-frag id="rw-highlight-cond"}
[]{.fragment .rw-frag id="rw-result"}
[]{.fragment .rw-frag id="rw-highlight-changed"}
